John Wilcox, born in England, died at Hartford, Conn., 1 Oct. 1651.  He was an original settler of …

deathPlace.address: Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
John-1 Wilcocks/Wilcox: End-of-Line Ancestor of Unknown Origins

The origins of John Wilcocks of Hartford, Connecticut are unknown (Robert Charles Anderson, FASG [Fellow of the American Society of Genealogists], The Great Migration Directory: Immigrants to New England, 1620–1640; a Concise Compendium [Boston: New England Historical and Genealogical Society, 2015], 373).  

===

BIRTH DATA & NAMES OF  PARENTS OF JOHN WILCOX OR WILCOCKS ARE UNKNOWN OR CANNOT BE VERIFIED (See Discussion item).  VIEW BIOGRAPHICAL ITEMS IN STORIES (MEMORIES) FOR THIS RECORD,  L4QL-DR8.

John Wilcox, the American ancestor, came from England prior to 1636, his wife, Mary, son John and other children; 

settled in Boston, and later removed to Hartford Connecticut (with Dr. Thomas Hooker and company), of which town he was one of the original Proprietors in 1636. 

He was Surveyor of Highways, 1642-1644; Juror, 1645; Selectman, 1649.

zh.lifeSummary: John Wilcox Sr.於大約1590年出生在英國。他於大約1615年與Mary在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加。他去世於1651年10月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年62歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Wilcox Sr.于大约1590年出生在英国。他于大约1615年与Mary在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加。他去世于1651年10月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年62岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wilcox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, Lancashire, and Flintshire): variant of Wilcock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This form of the surname is based on the pronunciation.

variants.name: Wilcock
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Wilcoc, a pet form of William (composed of the elements Will 1 + the hypocoristic suffix -cok; see Cocke ).

variants.name: Willcox
meanings: English: variant of   Wilcox  , widespread in southwestern England.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials list.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John Wilcox Sr. was born about 1590, in England. He married Mary about 1615, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He immigrated to British Colonial America in 1634. He died on 1 October 1651, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wilcox Sr.は約1590年にイギリスで生まれた。約1615年にイギリスでMaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1634年にイギリス植民地アメリカに移住した。彼は1651年10月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで62歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンアンシエント セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wilcox Sr.(은)는 대략 1590년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1615년 영국에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1634년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1651년 10월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던 앤시트 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Wilcox Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1590, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mary aproximadamente 1615, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o British Colonial America em 1634. Ele faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1651, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: John Wilcox Sr. родился около 1590 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary около 1615 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году. Он умер 1 октября 1651 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ансиент кеметири, ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.
